name: Dead City Zombie Invasion 2023
description: is an action-adventure game that places you in the shoes of a well-armed individual, tasked with eradicating hordes of zombies that have infested a city. Vigilance is key to surviving the onslaught of the living dead. The game offers user-friendly controls, allowing you to navigate by simply tapping the desired location on the screen. If youre in the mood for some zombie-slaying action, aim accurately at your undead adversaries. Website Developer <a href='https://ro.kizi10.org'>https://ro.kizi10.org</a>
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: apocalypse, Levels, Mentolatux, Shooting, Skills, survival, WebGL, Zombie
